questions.prompt: Which attribute on <option> marks it as the default choice?
Which attribute makes a <select> allow multiple selections?
Where does the initial text of a <textarea> go?
options: As text content between the tags
questions.explanation: Unlike <input>, textarea takes its default value as text content between opening and closing tags.

questions.prompt: Group related options in a <select> with:
questions.explanation: <optgroup label="Fruits"> groups options and shows the label.

questions.prompt: For a native suggestion list (datalist) attached to an input:

questions.explanation: CSS resize: none | horizontal | vertical | both.

questions.prompt: For a textarea to grow with content:
questions.explanation: field-sizing: content is the new native way. Historically people used JS.

questions.prompt: To show multiple options at once in a select:
options: Both A and B work differently
questions.explanation: size=n shows n options at once. multiple lets you pick multiple.
